# Copilot Instructions

## Repository Overview

This is the **Co-ci-pokaze2** repository. It is a minimal repository currently containing only a README file. There are no source files, build scripts, tests, or CI pipelines configured at this time.

## Project Layout

```
.
├── .github/
│   └── copilot-instructions.md   # This file
```

## Build & Test

There are currently no build steps, test suites, or linting configurations in this repository. If any are added in the future, update this file accordingly.

## Guidelines for the Coding Agent

- This repository has no existing source code, so new features should be implemented from scratch using best practices for the chosen language/framework.
- There are no CI workflows configured yet; validate changes manually.
- Keep code changes minimal and focused on the task at hand.
- Update this file if the repository structure, build process, or tooling changes significantly.
